item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $2.8B In Record 9-Day Outflow Streak
item.description:
Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $2.8B In Record 9-Day Outflow Streak

Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded another $223 million in net outflows on Thursday, marking the record nine-day outflow streak since the funds launched in 2024,

US spot Bitcoin ETF outflows in May 2026 versus February 2025. Source:
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $2.8B In Record 9-Day Outflow Streak

Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded another $223 million in net outflows on Thursday, marking the record nine-day outflow streak since the funds launched in 2024,

US spot Bitcoin ETF outflows in May 2026 versus February 2025. Source:
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Papers, Please: Online Age Checks Create a Pointless Privacy Risks— One of the world’s leading age verification providers(clients include Meta, OnlyFans, Sony PlayStation, and TikTok) collect and share highly sensitive personal data—including facial photos and device fingerprints—with third parties.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: The Secret Garden of Rock-Paper-Scissors
item.description: The Secret Garden of Rock-Paper-Scissors
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Both Sides Agree Iran Deal 'Close' But Not Finalized, As Trump Promises 'Final Determination' Soon
item.description:
Both Sides Agree Iran Deal 'Close' But Not Finalized, As Trump Promises 'Final Determination' Soon

Summary

  • NYT: President Trump’s meeting in the Situation Room lasted about two hours, but the president did not reach a decision on any new deal with Iran.
  • Trump repeats conditions on Iran for lifting US naval blockade, oil pushed lower. Fars responds: "Mix of truth & lies."
item.content:encoded:
Both Sides Agree Iran Deal 'Close' But Not Finalized, As Trump Promises 'Final Determination' Soon

Summary

  • NYT: President Trump’s meeting in the Situation Room lasted about two hours, but the president did not reach a decision on any new deal with Iran.
  • Trump repeats conditions on Iran for lifting US naval blockade, oil pushed lower. Fars responds: "Mix of truth & lies."
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: How do you think they did this?
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said at a Reagan Economic Forum event that the United States has seized $1 billion of Iranian cryptocurrency money as part of its effort to squeeze Iran’s economy. “Just outright grabbed the wallets,” Bessent said, referring to the accounts where digital currency is stored. “Some of them may be typing in right now and might not realize their
item.content:encoded: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said at a Reagan Economic Forum event that the United States has seized $1 billion of Iranian cryptocurrency money as part of its effort to squeeze Iran’s economy. “Just outright grabbed the wallets,” Bessent said, referring to the accounts where digital currency is stored. “Some of them may be typing in right now and might not realize their
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Refiles Lawsuit Over Wall Street Journal Article Linking Him To Epstein Letter
item.description:
Trump Refiles Lawsuit Over Wall Street Journal Article Linking Him To Epstein Letter

Trump’s legal team submitted the revised complaint exactly on the May 27 deadline set by U.S. District Judge Darrin Gayles. In April, Gayles Tyler Durden Fri, 05/29/2026 - 15:40
item.content:encoded:
Trump Refiles Lawsuit Over Wall Street Journal Article Linking Him To Epstein Letter

Trump’s legal team submitted the revised complaint exactly on the May 27 deadline set by U.S. District Judge Darrin Gayles. In April, Gayles Tyler Durden Fri, 05/29/2026 - 15:40
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Ask HN: Question for Startup Founders on tracking emotions and cognitive signals
item.description: Hey HN, I've noticed there's been a strong aversion and tone in regard to companies tracking emotional and cognitive signals to make decisions. I'd like to get people's opinions on this and possibly understand if there's a frame where you would be FOR this in running your own startups. What is your stance on businesses tracking Emotional Intelligence? Would it make sense i
item.content:encoded: Hey HN, I've noticed there's been a strong aversion and tone in regard to companies tracking emotional and cognitive signals to make decisions. I'd like to get people's opinions on this and possibly understand if there's a frame where you would be FOR this in running your own startups. What is your stance on businesses tracking Emotional Intelligence? Would it make sense i
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Canadian Government Is Crushing Indie Media With Two Sneaky Policies
item.description:
Canadian Government Is Crushing Indie Media With Two Sneaky Policies

Canada is not only going the way of Europe with the country's draconian speech laws, it is in many ways surpassing the suppression and censorship across the Atlantic. The speed at which the population is being robbed of their freedoms is staggering, and much of this is being done through backdoor bureaucracy.

One factor that consistently frustrated the globalist Trudeau regime during the pandemic
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Government Is Crushing Indie Media With Two Sneaky Policies

Canada is not only going the way of Europe with the country's draconian speech laws, it is in many ways surpassing the suppression and censorship across the Atlantic. The speed at which the population is being robbed of their freedoms is staggering, and much of this is being done through backdoor bureaucracy.

One factor that consistently frustrated the globalist Trudeau regime during the pandemic
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: 'Some form of crisis is almost inevitable': The $38 trillion national debt will soon be growing faster than the U.S. economy itself, watchdog warns
item.description: 'Some form of crisis is almost inevitable': The $38 trillion national debt will soon be growing faster than the U.S. economy itself, watchdog warns Fortune
item.content:encoded: 'Some form of crisis is almost inevitable': The $38 trillion national debt will soon be growing faster than the U.S. economy itself, watchdog warns Fortune
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: The comparing privacy solutions in DeFi right now
item.description:
MEV doesn't get talked about enough relative to how much it actually costs people.

Unless you're a whale, most traders know sandwich attacks exist in the abstract but have no idea how much they're losing to them or what the realistic protection options are.

There are several approaches worth knowing about and they work very differently from each other.
item.content:encoded:
MEV doesn't get talked about enough relative to how much it actually costs people.

Unless you're a whale, most traders know sandwich attacks exist in the abstract but have no idea how much they're losing to them or what the realistic protection options are.

There are several approaches worth knowing about and they work very differently from each other.
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Reddit scum re-enabled "Ads off Reddit"
item.description:
PSA: even if you disabled it before, check your settings -> privacy -> "Ads off RedditAllow Reddit to measure Reddit paid marketing campaigns on other sites and apps."

These low-life scumbags re-enabled it again.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
PSA: even if you disabled it before, check your settings -> privacy -> "Ads off RedditAllow Reddit to measure Reddit paid marketing campaigns on other sites and apps."

These low-life scumbags re-enabled it again.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Realistically, what does the government see when you use DDL sites, and do they actually care?
item.description:
Hey everyone,

Casual user here. I’ve read through the megathread and understand the basic recommendations around privacy, but I have a broader question about how network visibility and data collection actually work in the US when it comes to direct downloads (DDL) from sites like LibGen or Anna's Archive.

I know that because of HTTPS encryption, an ISP can onl
item.content:encoded:
Hey everyone,

Casual user here. I’ve read through the megathread and understand the basic recommendations around privacy, but I have a broader question about how network visibility and data collection actually work in the US when it comes to direct downloads (DDL) from sites like LibGen or Anna's Archive.

I know that because of HTTPS encryption, an ISP can onl
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Jon Stewart Alleges Secret Alien Retrieval Sites, Claims of Alien Bodies, Telepathy and Hidden Programs
item.description: UFO researcher and filmmaker Jon Stewart urged President Trump to take a leading role in disclosure while discussing alleged alien retrieval programs, telepathic communication with nonhuman beings and claims that advanced aerospace companies have reverse-engineered extraterrestrial technology. The extraordinary allegations remain unverified but reflect the increasingly expansive scope of today&#82
item.content:encoded: UFO researcher and filmmaker Jon Stewart urged President Trump to take a leading role in disclosure while discussing alleged alien retrieval programs, telepathic communication with nonhuman beings and claims that advanced aerospace companies have reverse-engineered extraterrestrial technology. The extraordinary allegations remain unverified but reflect the increasingly expansive scope of today&#82
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Leak Exposes Germany Forcing Social Media To Boost State Propaganda, Bury Dissent
item.description:
Leak Exposes Germany Forcing Social Media To Boost State Propaganda, Bury Dissent

Sold as a defense of “media plurality” against disinformation, this scheme reveals the ugly truth: after brute-force censorship ignited a global backlash and helped propel Elon Musk’s purchase of X, authorities are now seeking to engineer the feeds themselves to favor their approved narratives whil
item.content:encoded:
Leak Exposes Germany Forcing Social Media To Boost State Propaganda, Bury Dissent

Sold as a defense of “media plurality” against disinformation, this scheme reveals the ugly truth: after brute-force censorship ignited a global backlash and helped propel Elon Musk’s purchase of X, authorities are now seeking to engineer the feeds themselves to favor their approved narratives whil
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Leftist Party Wants Voting Rights For All Foreigners Who've Lived In Germany For 5 Years
item.description:
Leftist Party Wants Voting Rights For All Foreigners Who've Lived In Germany For 5 Years

To achieve this, the Left faction in the Bundestag has submitted a formal application demanding that anyone residing legally in the country for at least five years be permitted to vote in federal elections, irrespective of their nationality.

The move would serve as a
item.content:encoded:
Leftist Party Wants Voting Rights For All Foreigners Who've Lived In Germany For 5 Years

To achieve this, the Left faction in the Bundestag has submitted a formal application demanding that anyone residing legally in the country for at least five years be permitted to vote in federal elections, irrespective of their nationality.

The move would serve as a
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: [Federal Register] Regulation for Federal Financial Assistance
item.description: The Office of Management and Budget (OMB) proposes to revise the Guidance for Federal Financial Assistance to improve government- wide policies and requirements related to the management of grants, cooperative agreements, and other forms of assistance. OMB is proposing revisions that would improve transparency, accountability, and oversight for Federal awards across the Federal Government. This includes ensuring that American tax dollars are not wasted or misused, activities performed under Fede
item.content:encoded: The Office of Management and Budget (OMB) proposes to revise the Guidance for Federal Financial Assistance to improve government- wide policies and requirements related to the management of grants, cooperative agreements, and other forms of assistance. OMB is proposing revisions that would improve transparency, accountability, and oversight for Federal awards across the Federal Government. This includes ensuring that American tax dollars are not wasted or misused, activities performed under Fede
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Mamdani Turns To DOGE-Style Playbook After Tax-The-Rich Plan Stalls
item.description:
Mamdani Turns To DOGE-Style Playbook After Tax-The-Rich Plan Stalls

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has stolen the government-efficiency playbook from Elon Musk and President Trump's DOGE, repackaging it as the "Commission on Government Efficiency." This comes as the far-left mayor is grappling with a large budget deficit.

Democrats and their far-left, billionaire-funded NGOs and activist groups spent the first half of 2
item.content:encoded:
Mamdani Turns To DOGE-Style Playbook After Tax-The-Rich Plan Stalls

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has stolen the government-efficiency playbook from Elon Musk and President Trump's DOGE, repackaging it as the "Commission on Government Efficiency." This comes as the far-left mayor is grappling with a large budget deficit.

item.title: Canada Taunts Beijing With Frigate's Taiwan Strait Transit Despite Carney's China Reset
item.description:
Canada Taunts Beijing With Frigate's Taiwan Strait Transit Despite Carney's China Reset

Just days before a high-stakes meeting of Canadian officials with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ottawa, a Canadian frigate defied Beijing’s explicit warnings and sailed directly through the Taiwan Strait.

The Halifax-class frigate HMCS Charlottetown pulled off the transit in a rare solo run, without American or other accompanying vessels, bypassing the usu
item.content:encoded:
Canada Taunts Beijing With Frigate's Taiwan Strait Transit Despite Carney's China Reset

Just days before a high-stakes meeting of Canadian officials with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ottawa, a Canadian frigate defied Beijing’s explicit warnings and sailed directly through the Taiwan Strait.

The Halifax-class frigate HMCS Charlottetown pulled off the transit in a rare solo run, without American or other accompanying vessels, bypassing the usu
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Daily Crypto Discussion - May 28, 2026 (GMT+0)
item.description:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Next Drone War: Hidden Shipping Containers Launching Kamikaze Swarms
item.description:
Next Drone War: Hidden Shipping Containers Launching Kamikaze Swarms

Continuing our theme that the endgame in drone warfare is The American company Dzyne has introduced the BlitzBox system, a container for covertly launching a swarm of attack drones. On the outside, it looks like an ordinary cargo box, but inside, it can hold up to 100 Blitz drones, ready to launch in minutes.

The battlefield is shi
item.content:encoded:
Next Drone War: Hidden Shipping Containers Launching Kamikaze Swarms

Continuing our theme that the endgame in drone warfare is The American company Dzyne has introduced the BlitzBox system, a container for covertly launching a swarm of attack drones. On the outside, it looks like an ordinary cargo box, but inside, it can hold up to 100 Blitz drones, ready to launch in minutes.

The battlefield is shi
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: DOJ Launches Criminal Probe Into E. Jean Carroll Over Alleged Perjury In Trump Lawsuits
item.description:
DOJ Launches Criminal Probe Into E. Jean Carroll Over Alleged Perjury In Trump Lawsuits

The Department of Justice has opened a criminal investigation into E. Jean Carroll, the veteran advice columnist and author who won two major civil lawsuits against President Donald Trump,

The probe focuses on Carroll's 2022 deposition.
item.content:encoded:
DOJ Launches Criminal Probe Into E. Jean Carroll Over Alleged Perjury In Trump Lawsuits

The Department of Justice has opened a criminal investigation into E. Jean Carroll, the veteran advice columnist and author who won two major civil lawsuits against President Donald Trump,

The probe focuses on Carroll's 2022 deposition.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Remarkable Turns Of Events
item.description:
Remarkable Turns Of Events

By Michael Every of Rabobank

It’s remarkable screen oil prices are little changed at below $100 today after Trump said the US is “not satisfied” over talks with Iran, days after claiming a deal was imminent, and hours after saying the terms the Iranians had leaked that the US agrees to --a real TACO-- were a “complete fabrication.”
item.content:encoded:
Remarkable Turns Of Events

By Michael Every of Rabobank

It’s remarkable screen oil prices are little changed at below $100 today after Trump said the US is “not satisfied” over talks with Iran, days after claiming a deal was imminent, and hours after saying the terms the Iranians had leaked that the US agrees to --a real TACO-- were a “complete fabrication.”
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures
item.description: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures The New York Times
item.content:encoded: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures The New York Times
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Stellar 7 Year Auction Sees 3rd Highest Foreign Award On Record
item.description:
Stellar 7 Year Auction Sees 3rd Highest Foreign Award On Record

In the week's final coupon auction, the US Treasury sold $44 billion in 7 Year notes to stellar demand.

Extending on the strength yesterday's solid (if tailing) 5 Year auction, today's 7 Year sale printed at a high yield of 4.290%, up from 4.175% and the highest since Jan 2025. It also stopped through the When Issued 4.291% by 0.1bps, the first stop through since December 2025.
item.content:encoded:
Stellar 7 Year Auction Sees 3rd Highest Foreign Award On Record

In the week's final coupon auction, the US Treasury sold $44 billion in 7 Year notes to stellar demand.

Extending on the strength yesterday's solid (if tailing) 5 Year auction, today's 7 Year sale printed at a high yield of 4.290%, up from 4.175% and the highest since Jan 2025. It also stopped through the When Issued 4.291% by 0.1bps, the first stop through since December 2025.
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: In Malaysia, there was a bomb threat incident which is likely the first ever violent reaction against privacy-intrusive age verification laws

item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: I used Face App on one picture. What did I give away?
item.description: Hi there! 👋🏽 I am erm... nevermind that. I just got the Face App and used it on one picture. It asked me to allow access and I gave it limited access. It asked for permission for something else but I've now forgotten and I opted for the "only when app is use" or something option. I showed it to my sister and she freaked out because of privacy issues. My question is, what
item.content:encoded: Hi there! 👋🏽 I am erm... nevermind that. I just got the Face App and used it on one picture. It asked me to allow access and I gave it limited access. It asked for permission for something else but I've now forgotten and I opted for the "only when app is use" or something option. I showed it to my sister and she freaked out because of privacy issues. My question is, what
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Navigation tools which are privacy focused?
item.description:
I have been trying out Organic Maps and it is obviously not going to have real time traffic info but it is open source and not awful as far as I can tell.

I wish I could overlay it with Flockhopper, I’m sick of feeling surveilled everywhere I go.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I have been trying out Organic Maps and it is obviously not going to have real time traffic info but it is open source and not awful as far as I can tell.

I wish I could overlay it with Flockhopper, I’m sick of feeling surveilled everywhere I go.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Bessent Warns Oman On Hormuz Toll Scheme, After Trump Threatened To 'Blow Up' US Ally
item.description:
Bessent Warns Oman On Hormuz Toll Scheme, After Trump Threatened To 'Blow Up' US Ally

On an official level at least, Oman remains a close strategic partner and key ally of the United States in the Middle East; however, that relationship has been severely strained this month amid apparent Iranian-Omani cooperation regarding a potential toll system for the Strait of Hormuz. This of course flies in the face of the US posture in the region.

US Treasury Secretary Scott B
item.content:encoded:
Bessent Warns Oman On Hormuz Toll Scheme, After Trump Threatened To 'Blow Up' US Ally

On an official level at least, Oman remains a close strategic partner and key ally of the United States in the Middle East; however, that relationship has been severely strained this month amid apparent Iranian-Omani cooperation regarding a potential toll system for the Strait of Hormuz. This of course flies in the face of the US posture in the region.

US Treasury Secretary Scott B
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Oklo COO Says Nuclear Waste Could Power America For 150 Years
item.description:
Oklo COO Says Nuclear Waste Could Power America For 150 Years

Earlier this week, we

Silicon Valley’s AI Boom Fast-Tracking Nuclear Energy

The AI infrastructure arms race has abruptly transformed advanced nuclear energy from a niche policy idea into a strategic national priority.

DeWitte said the current policy environment, under Trump’s energy secretary Chris Wrig
item.content:encoded:
Oklo COO Says Nuclear Waste Could Power America For 150 Years

Earlier this week, we

Silicon Valley’s AI Boom Fast-Tracking Nuclear Energy

The AI infrastructure arms race has abruptly transformed advanced nuclear energy from a niche policy idea into a strategic national priority.

DeWitte said the current policy environment, under Trump’s energy secretary Chris Wrig
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: UK Targets Kremlin-Linked Crypto Network In Latest Sanctions Round
item.description:
UK Targets Kremlin-Linked Crypto Network In Latest Sanctions Round

The measures focus on the Kremlin-backed A7 network, a ruble-based settlement system, and a cluster of exchanges and firms that route payments through Kyrgyzstan and Georgia.

Announced by Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper, the package

Officials say the list includ
item.content:encoded:
UK Targets Kremlin-Linked Crypto Network In Latest Sanctions Round

The measures focus on the Kremlin-backed A7 network, a ruble-based settlement system, and a cluster of exchanges and firms that route payments through Kyrgyzstan and Georgia.

Announced by Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper, the package

Officials say the list includ
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.description: IBM and Red Hat Commit $5B to Redefine the Future of Open Source in the AI Era
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Solar Stocks Flash Major Technical Breakout As Tariff Talk Escalates
item.description:
Solar Stocks Flash Major Technical Breakout As Tariff Talk Escalates

Solar stocks are showing a clear technical shift, breaking above a well-defined downtrend after more than five years of sustained pressure.

UBS analyst Catherine Gordon is attributing the surge in solar stocks to falling yields and renewed policy momentum. A potential Section 232 tariff announcement in mid-to-late June is adding fuel to the rally, with Firs
item.content:encoded:
Solar Stocks Flash Major Technical Breakout As Tariff Talk Escalates

Solar stocks are showing a clear technical shift, breaking above a well-defined downtrend after more than five years of sustained pressure.

UBS analyst Catherine Gordon is attributing the surge in solar stocks to falling yields and renewed policy momentum. A potential Section 232 tariff announcement in mid-to-late June is adding fuel to the rally, with Firs
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: KIT researchers can uniquely identify people moving through a space using cheap, ordinary WiFi routers with 99.5% accuracy, and the people do not need to be carrying any device.
item.description:
One researcher called it what it is: "This technology turns every router into a potential means for surveillance." If a research team gets this with off-the-shelf gear, imagine a purpose-built one.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
One researcher called it what it is: "This technology turns every router into a potential means for surveillance." If a research team gets this with off-the-shelf gear, imagine a purpose-built one.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Are they keeping track of who is and isn't zionists?
item.description: I got this text a couple days ago asking my opinion on israel, which I usually ignore spam texts, but I was lowkey tempted to give Sara a piece of my mind. What stopped me is that it occurred to me that it's possible they're collecting data on people who oppose israel. I looked up the number and it looks like it comes from DC, but they
item.content:encoded: I got this text a couple days ago asking my opinion on israel, which I usually ignore spam texts, but I was lowkey tempted to give Sara a piece of my mind. What stopped me is that it occurred to me that it's possible they're collecting data on people who oppose israel. I looked up the number and it looks like it comes from DC, but they
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez
